title: Admission enquiries are open
summary: Parents and guardians can contact the school office for admission guidance and class placement support.
content:
Redeemers International School, Enugu welcomes admission enquiries from parents and guardians.

The admissions team guides families through class placement, entrance assessment information, and registration steps.

title: Learning in the classroom
summary: Classroom teaching remains central to the school’s academic structure and learner development.
content:
The classroom environment at Redeemers International School supports daily lessons, guided practice, assessment, and teacher attention.

Learners are encouraged to build confidence, discipline, and steady academic habits.

title: Practical science learning
summary: Students are shown engaging with laboratory instruments and practical demonstrations.
content: Students learn in a laboratory setting where practical exposure helps learners connect classroom lessons with observation, handling of instruments, and guided demonstrations.

title: Knowledge And Fear of The Lord
summary: The school motto is preserved as the guiding language for this new website.
content:
The Redeemers International School crest carries the motto “Knowledge And Fear of The Lord.”

The new website uses this language as a consistent expression of the school’s identity and values.
